text: Frequently Asked Questions Skip to content Apply to Program Faq Frequently asked questions

Where can I study AI in Nepal? You can study AI at various local universities, local university colleges and foreign affiliated colleges in Nepal. The course offered at Sunway College Kathmandu is BSc(Hons) Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence which specializes in data science and artificial intelligence.
What is the global ranking of Birmingham City University? Birmingham City University ranks 501 – 600 globally as per Times Higher Education 2024.
Why should I study with a high ranking university? A degree from a top university is recognized worldwide, opening doors to international opportunities.
Are the courses approved by the Ministry of Education Nepal? Yes, the courses offered by Sunway College Kathmandu are approved by the Ministry of Education, Nepal.
Are the courses certified equivalence by Tribhuwan University? Yes, the courses offered by Sunway College Kathmandu are certified equivalence by Tribhuwan University.

Which +2 stream students can apply for the BSc (Hons) Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence program? All +2 stream students (Science, Management, Humanities, Education and others) can apply for the program having met the eligibility criteria mentioned under the program.

I do not have GPA 3.0 and above, can I still apply to study at Sunway College Kathmandu? Students who do not meet the entry requirements, can still apply to study the course. The application submitted shall be verified by the Course Committee at BCU and can be approved on a case by case basis.
Do BSc (Hons) Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence programs include placement? Yes, the program includes a dedicated professional placement year.

Where can we get placed in the professional placement year? We have a dedicated placement cell headed by Khushal Regmi, Professional Placement Coordinator who is responsible for collaborating with the industry to bring professional placement opportunities to the students. Students may also seek placement opportunities on their own and shall receive support from the placement cell during the process. The placement cell also organizes various skill training sessions that helps students to meet the entry level standards for the industry.
Are there any scholarships available at Sunway College? Yes, scholarships are available based on merit and economic condition.
How do I apply to Sunway College? You can fill out the admission form here: or contact the Admissions Department at admission@sunway.edu.np or 9823047066.
How many enrollment intakes does Sunway have in a year? There are two enrollment intakes, Autumn and Spring intakes.
Where is Sunway College Kathmandu Located? Sunway College Kathmandu is located Behind Maitidevi Temple, Maitidevi, Kathmandu, Nepal.

What are the available courses at Sunway College? The available courses at Sunway are: BSc (Hons) Computer Science With Artificial Intelligence (AI) in academic partnership with Birmingham City University, UK. (Approved) BSc(Hons) Business Information Technology (Approval in process - expected to run by Autumn 2025) BSc(Hons) Cybersecurity (Approval in process - expected to run by Autumn 2025) MSc Artificial Intelligence (Approval in process - expected to run by Autumn 2025)

What is the Sunway AI Scholarship Award? The Sunway AI Scholarship Award is offered by Sunway College Kathmandu to support outstanding students pursuing a BSc(Hons) Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence based on a scholarship test.

What are the eligibility criteria for the AI Scholarship Award? The Sunway AI Scholarship Award is determined post admissions. The student must have achieved the following: Completed Grade 12 with a minimum CGPA of 3.0 (or equivalent) Met English proficiency requirements (Grade B in Grade 12 English + BCU EPT 5.5 or equivalent recognized English test) Attended Early Bird Admissions Classes Settled all admission fees at Sunway College Kathmandu
What is the application deadline for the Sunway AI Scholarship Award for Spring 2025 Intake? The application deadline for the Sunway AI Scholarship Award for Sprint 2025 Intae is March 14, 2025.

How will the scholarship recipients be selected? 100% Scholarship: Based on Scholarship Test and Interview (March 30th & 31st, 2025) 50% Scholarships: Based on Scholarship Test and Interview (March 30th & 31st, 2025) 30% Scholarships: Based on admission documents and interview

What does the scholarship cover? 100% Scholarship: Covers college semester fees (excluding admission fees, induction/ECA/CCA fees, annual fees, and university fees) 50% Scholarships: Covers 50% of college semester fees (excluding admission fees, induction/ECA/CCA fees, annual fees, and university fees) 30% Scholarships: Covers 30% of college semester fees (excluding admission fees, induction/ECA/CCA fees, annual fees, and university fees)
How can I renew my scholarship? Maintaining satisfactory academic performance as per the scholarship policy and college regulations is crucial for scholarship renewal.
What happens if I fail to maintain the scholarship requirements? Failure to meet the academic performance standards may result in the revocation of the scholarship award.

What are the key features of the BSc (Hons) Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence program? Strong foundation in Computer Science Focus on key AI topics like Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing Industry-relevant skills development Professional placement year for practical experience Individual Honours Project for in-depth research and application

What are the entry requirements for the program? Grade 12 completion with a minimum CGPA of 3.0 (or equivalent) Meeting English proficiency requirements (Grade B in Grade 12 English + BCU EPT 5.5 or equivalent recognized English test)

What are the career prospects after completing this program? After completing the course, you may choose to work as a Software Developer, Software Engineer, Web Developer, Computer Programmer, Machine Learning Engineer, Data Scientist, Artificial Intelligence Engineer and many more!
Are there any job opportunities for students? Yes, the course offers a 9-month placement to students as part of the Professional Placement Year. The college also has a dedicated placement cell.
Who to consult for job placements in Sunway College? You can talk to Mr. Khushal Regmi, who heads the placement cell at Sunway College in the capacity of the Professional Placement Coordinator.
What is professional placement? After the completion of the second year, students must undergo a placement year where they are hired by companies as interns for at least 9 months.

How much are the opportunities for on-campus jobs? Students are often hired as interns based on their performance by the college during their academic journey at the college. You can work with the IT department, IoT and Research Lab at the college.

What are the class timings at Sunway? The class schedule is released by the Registry Timetable and Examination Department at the beginning of each semester and updated as required. The classes usually run from 7 AM to 1 PM. Additional classes may be offered on a case by case basis.

Does Sunway College Kathmandu have an official student body? Yes. The official student body at Sunway College Kathmandu is Sunway Student Representative Council. The council has student representatives from all batches and the executive members of the council run various clubs at Sunway.

How do I apply for data fellowship at Sunway? Sunway Student Representative Council partners with DataCamp to offer Data Fellowship to students from all over Nepal. You can visit their website and subscribe to their social media accounts to stay updated regarding the data fellowship openings or simply inquire at datafellowship@sunway.edu.np .

Do students have Research Opportunities at Sunway College? Students are required to mandatorily learn research writing right from the inception of their course and have the opportunity to work in the research lab alongside dedicated research assistants and professors at the college. The college also provides ample opportunities for students to collaborate with industry experts or researchers to work on various projects. Start with Sunway College Quick Enquiry
